title: justicia procumbens var. hayatae
intro: Justicia procumbens var. hayatae, also known as Turkish angelica, is a plant species in the Acanthaceae family, native to Turkey and the Caucasus region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Justicia procumbens var. hayatae include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
